title: FATA[0000] unknown flag: --dest-daemon-host
body:
```
+ /nix/store/pzd42dsqpdl0n9d8kb4x43rzlq08pvhn-skopeo-1.18.0/bin/skopeo --insecure-policy copy --dest-cert-dir=/home/pcarrier/.minikube/certs --dest-daemon-host=tcp://127.0.0.1:36440 docker-archive:/nix/store/gq1cwnair4nkhnhpwvafnifqskqnb1wa-docker-image-multiverse-k8s.tar.gz docker-daemon:k8s/multiverse:4dcd977-dirty
FATA[0000] unknown flag: --dest-daemon-host             
```

Am I missing something?
